narrative: Renewed US strikes on Iran drive geopolitical risk premium — GBP/USD retreats to 1.3525 as crude firms; gold lower -0.18% near $4,045; equities +0.38%; DXY +0.03%; VIX 15.7. NZD/USD bilateral divergence dominates G10 (spread 1.768%) as NZD 1W avg +1.176% vs USD -0.592%; Fed 3.75% vs RBNZ 2.5% (125bp) carry anchors the pair. Watch ECB Rate Decision July 23.
